core.database.manager module

DATABASE MANAGER – Lightweight orchestrator for database operations

PURPOSE:

Provides a unified interface to the database layer by coordinating: - Database adapter (SQLite/PostgreSQL) - Repositories for different data domains - Transaction management - Connection lifecycle

WHY THIS EXISTS:

  • Single entry point for all database operations

  • Hides complexity of repositories from callers

  • Manages adapter lifecycle

  • Follows facade pattern

AUTHOR: Deepak Panigrahy

class core.database.manager.DatabaseManager(config: Dict[str, Any])[source]

Bases: object

Main interface to the A‑LEMS database.

This class orchestrates all database operations by delegating to: - A database adapter (SQLite/PostgreSQL) - Specialized repositories for different data domains

Usage:

config = config_loader.get_db_config() db = DatabaseManager(config)

# Insert data exp_id = db.insert_experiment(experiment_data) run_id = db.insert_run(exp_id, hw_id, run_data)

# Query data runs = db.get_runs_by_experiment(exp_id) ml_data = db.get_ml_data()

# Transaction management with db.transaction():

db.insert_hardware(hw_data) db.insert_baseline(baseline_data)

close() → None[source]

Close database connection.

commit() → None[source]

Commit the current transaction.

create_tables() → None[source]

Create all tables if they don’t exist.

create_tax_summaries(exp_id: int) → None[source]

Create tax summaries for an experiment.

create_tax_summary_for_pair(linear_id: int, agentic_id: int, linear_uj: int, agentic_uj: int, linear_orchestration_uj: int = 0, agentic_orchestration_uj: int = 0) → None[source]

Create tax summary for one pair.

Parameters:

  • exp_id – Experiment ID

  • linear_id – Linear run ID

  • agentic_id – Agentic run ID

  • linear_uj – Linear dynamic energy in microjoules

  • agentic_uj – Agentic dynamic energy in microjoules

get_ml_data(workflow: str | None = None) → List[Dict[str, Any]][source]

Retrieve flattened ML data.

get_run(run_id: int) → Dict[str, Any] | None[source]

Retrieve a single run by ID.

get_runs_by_experiment(exp_id: int) → List[Dict[str, Any]][source]

Retrieve all runs for an experiment.

get_tax_summaries(exp_id: int | None = None) → List[Dict[str, Any]][source]

Retrieve tax summaries.

insert_baseline(baseline_data: Dict[str, Any]) → str[source]

Insert an idle baseline measurement.

insert_cpu_samples(run_id: int, samples: List[Dict[str, Any]]) → None[source]

Insert CPU samples.

insert_energy_samples(run_id: int, samples: List[Dict[str, Any]]) → None[source]

Insert high-frequency RAPL samples.

insert_environment_config(env_data: dict) → int[source]

Insert environment config or return existing ID

insert_experiment(experiment_data: Dict[str, Any]) → int[source]

Insert a new experiment record.

insert_hardware(hardware_data: Dict[str, Any]) → int[source]

Insert or retrieve hardware configuration.

insert_interrupt_samples(run_id: int, samples: List[Dict[str, Any]]) → None[source]

Insert interrupt samples.

insert_orchestration_events(run_id: int, events: List[Dict[str, Any]]) → None[source]

Insert orchestration events for a run.

insert_run(exp_id: int, hw_id: int | None, run_data: Dict[str, Any]) → int[source]

Insert a complete run with all metrics.

Delegates to RunsRepository for the complex 80+ column insert.

insert_thermal_samples(run_id: int, thermal_samples: List[Dict[str, Any]]) → None[source]

Insert thermal samples for a run.

rollback() → None[source]

Rollback the current transaction.

transaction()[source]

Begin a transaction context.

Usage:
with db.transaction():

db.insert_experiment(data1) db.insert_experiment(data2)

update_run_stats(run_id: int, stats: Dict) → None[source]

Update run with aggregated statistics from samples.
